title: Azhagana Ratchashiyae Song Lyrics Mudhalvan
stanzas:
Azhagana Ratchashiyae Song Lyrics Mudhalvan
#ARRahman #SPB #Harini

Azhagaana ratchashiye
adi nenjil kudhikkuriye
muttaasu vaarthaiyile
pattaasu vedikkuriye
adi manasa aruvaamanaiyil
arukkuriye (2)

arugam pullukku
arukka theriyumaa
kuzhandha kumari
naan, aamaa.

aiyira meenuthaan
kokka muzhungumaa
adukkumaa

veliya poothu nee
ulla kaaikkira
kadal kaadu nee
aamaa

uyira urichi nee
kayira thirikkura
sugam sugamaa

kilye aalan kiliye
kuyile yaelan kuyile

Azhagaana ratchashiye
adi nenjil kudhikkuriye
adi manasa aruvaamanaiyil
arukkuriye

Sooriyana rendu thundu
senji kannil kondavalo
oho oho..

chandhirana kallukulla
ooravacha pennivalo
ohoo.

rathiriya getti getti
senja maiyidavo
ahaan ..

minminiya kannathula
ottavachi kaithattavo
oho.ho..

thurui enna thulachiputta
thookkam ippa dhooramaiyaa
tharaikku vachi naan padukka
azhuku vaeti thaarumaiyaa

thoongum thookkam kanavaa
kilye aalan kiliye
kuyile yaelan kuyile

Azhagaana ratchashiye
adi nenjil kudhikkuriye
muttaasu vaarthaiyile
pattaasu vedikkuriye
adi manasa aruvaamanaiyil
arukkuriye

thaenkootta pichi pichi
yechi vaikka
latchiyamaa ahaan oho

kadhal enna katchi
vittu katchi maarum
kaariyamaa oho ho..

onnu sonnaa thalakeezha
ukki poda mudiyumaa
ahaan oho..

naan nadakum nizhalukkul
nee vasikka sammadhamaa

neeraaga naan irundhaa
un nethiyila naan irangi
kooraana un nenjil
kudhichi anga kudi iruppen

aanaa veenaa ponen
kilye aalan kiliye
kuyile yaelan kuyile

Azhagaana ratchashiye
adi nenjil kudhikkuriye
muttaasu vaarthaiyile
pattaasu vedikkuriye
adi manasa aruvaamanaiyil
arukkuriye

arugam pullukku
arukka theriyumaa
kuzhandha kumari
naan, aamaa.

aiyira meenuthaan
kokka muzhungumaa
adukkumaa

veliya poothu nee
ulla kaaikkira
kadal kaadu nee
aamaa

uyira urichi nee
kayira thirikkura
sugam sugamaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Azhagana Ratchashiyae?

The song Azhagana Ratchashiyae expresses the beauty and charm of love, capturing the emotions of romance and affection.

How does this song fit into the plot of Mudhalvan?

In Mudhalvan, this song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the overall narrative of love and connection.

Who are the artists behind this song?

The song features the talented voices of GV Prakash Kumar, Harini, and the legendary SPB, with music composed by AR Rahman.

When was Azhagana Ratchashiyae released?

Azhagana Ratchashiyae was released on November 7, 1999, as part of the movie Mudhalvan.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Azhagana Ratchashiyae, the characters experience a beautiful moment of love and connection, perfectly encapsulated by the enchanting melodies of AR Rahman. The song's lyrics, penned by Vairamuthu, evoke feelings of joy and romance, making it a standout track in the film Mudhalvan. The harmonious blend of GV Prakash Kumar and SPB's voices adds depth to the emotional landscape of the song. Overall, it serves as a celebration of love, resonating with listeners and leaving a lasting impact.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting vibes of Azhagana Ratchashiyae from the iconic Mudhalvan, where the magical collaboration of AR Rahman's music and the soulful voices of GV Prakash Kumar and SPB create a mesmerizing auditory experience. This song beautifully captures the essence of romance and joy, making it a timeless favorite. Dive into the lyrical brilliance of Vairamuthu that elevates this track to a whole new level of charm!
stanzaMeanings: The beautiful demon is stirring in my heart, it is a sweet word that has entered my mind.
Do you know how to cut grass for the little girl? Yes.
Is a thousand fish swimming in the pond?
You bloom outside while you are inside the sea, right?
You are the joy that makes my heart flutter, is it good?
Oh dear, oh parrot, oh cuckoo, oh parrot.
The beautiful demon is stirring in my heart, it is a sweet word that has entered my mind.
If the sun shines, will it enter your eyes? Oh oh..
In the moonlight, will the stones be like women? Oh oh.
Is the night making a noise?
In the twinkling eyes, will it hold my hand? Oh oh..
What is this sleep that has come to me, will it take me far away?
Oh dear, oh parrot, oh cuckoo, oh parrot.
The beautiful demon is stirring in my heart, it is a sweet word that has entered my mind.
Will the crazy thoughts of the house be a blessing? Oh oh..
What is love, will it change the situation? Oh oh..
If I say one thing, will you be able to handle it? Oh oh..
Will you stay in the shadow where I walk?
If I were water, I would flow into your eyes, I would enter your heart and stay there.
But I have gone away, oh dear, oh parrot, oh cuckoo.
The beautiful demon is stirring in my heart, it is a sweet word that has entered my mind.
Do you know how to cut grass for the little girl? Yes.
Is a thousand fish swimming in the pond?
You bloom outside while you are inside the sea, right?
You are the joy that makes my heart flutter, is it good?
